entries.label: NHM2 experiment research gap ledger

Null results are stage evidence and must remain visible.

entries.label: NHM2 layer-stack mechanical receipt
aliases: P_ideal = pi^2 hbar c/(240 a^4); F_stack = N_layer P_ideal A

actions.label: Open layer-stack mechanical receipt
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The 447-layer force calculation is an internal-load diagnostic; it cannot substitute for material, pull-in, support, thermal, fatigue, active-control, or full-tensor receipts.

claimBoundaryNotes: Internal Casimir attraction is not thrust.
Ideal scalar load is not a material receipt.
Linear layer scaling must be receipted rather than assumed.

entries.label: NHM2 layer-stack support-fraction sweep
aliases: sigma_support = F_stack/(A f_s); R_source = (1-f_s) C_material eta_layer

actions.label: Open support-fraction go/no-go map
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The support-fraction sweep is a reduced-order go/no-go map; it cannot substitute for pull-in, material, active-control, full-tensor, or metric-response receipts.

claimBoundaryNotes: Support stress improves as support fraction rises, while source retention worsens.
A candidate window still needs support and drive tensor terms.
The sweep does not unlock physical, propulsion, route, speed, or transport claims.

entries.label: NHM2 layer-stack engineering architecture loop
aliases: sigma_support = F_stack/(A f_load); R_source = (1-f_lost) C_material eta_layer; M_pull-in = k_eff/(SF dF_Casimir/dg)

actions.label: Open architecture-loop go/no-go map
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The architecture loop is a diagnostic engineering research map; it cannot substitute for material coupons, pull-in tests, roughness and patch metrology, active-control receipts, or full-apparatus tensor terms.

claimBoundaryNotes: Load-bearing fraction and active-area loss are tracked separately.
Review windows prioritize engineering tests; they do not become material-source evidence.
Support, spacer, active-control, thermal, and electrostatic terms still have to enter the full apparatus tensor.

entries.label: NHM2 layer-stack full-apparatus receipt loop
aliases: Candidate_eng = M_coupon and F(g) and R_rough_patch and C_active and L_fatigue and S_layers and T_apparatus_munu

actions.label: Open full-apparatus receipt loop
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The full-apparatus receipt loop is an engineering evidence-admission ladder; it cannot substitute for physical viability, wall closure, transport, route, speed, or propulsion claims.

claimBoundaryNotes: All receipt surfaces are required before a row can become a receipted engineering candidate.
Ideal scalar Casimir formulas do not count as material coupon receipts.
Support, spacer, active-control, thermal, electrostatic, fatigue, and layer-scaling tensor terms must be represented before source tensor authority can judge the apparatus.

entries.label: NHM2 tile-source physical validation plan
aliases: Candidate_source = R_receipts and T_apparatus_munu and R_closure and nabla_mu_T_munu and QEI and EC_obs and M_cred and C_coupled
physically credible source candidate receipt plan

actions.label: Open tile-source validation plan
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The tile-source validation plan can localize physical-source blockers, but it cannot substitute for material receipts, full apparatus tensor authority, downstream gate closure, or physical transport validation.

claimBoundaryNotes: The frozen topology-optimized TiN lattice candidate is a validation target, not a physical source result.
Ideal scalar Casimir formulas do not count as material evidence.
A source tensor must include T00, T0i, diagonal Tij, off-diagonal Tij, support, spacer, active-control, electrostatic, thermal, and elastic terms.
Physical, route, speed, transport, and propulsion claim locks remain closed.

entries.label: Frozen 447-layer material-evidence gate
aliases: Coupon_admit = A_topology and N_layer=447 and f_support=0.26 and f_lost=0.08

actions.label: Open frozen 447-layer material gate
actions.claimBoundaryNote: The frozen 447-layer coupon gate is an evidence-admission and architecture-compatibility gate, not material validation, source proof, physical viability, transport, propulsion, route, or speed authority.

claimBoundaryNotes: A generic TiN coupon cannot stand in for the frozen 447-layer topology-optimized architecture.

Architecture identity, layer count, support fraction, lost active area, topology receipt, deposition receipt, stress map, adhesion protocol, and coupon population remain evidence-admission requirements.
Passing this gate would not by itself validate the material source or NHM2 transport.
